scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @loopy/server" "npm run dev -w @loopy/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @loopy/shared && npm run build -w @loopy/server && npm run build -w @loopy/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @loopy/shared && npm run typecheck -w @loopy/server && npm run typecheck -w @loopy/web
